Design: Cross-match EPC registry, local tax rolls, cadaster, commercial registries; flag worst-performer segments (e.g., EPC G/F non-residential) for notification.
MEPS portal with thresholds, deadlines, eligible measures, enabling finance, and FAQs; dashboard by county; communication in RO and EN.
Rolling letters/emails/SMS to identified owners 24–12–6 months before deadlines; OSS hotline and workshops.
Free initial advisory via OSS; audits reports for residential and non-residential; Renovation Passports for staged compliance; template tender docs.
Clear outline of compliance checks, evidence format (EPC or equivalent), audit probability, and well targeted penalties for non-compliance or false claims.
